instruction: The green checkmark on the user plus icon faces the wrong way. Mirror it back.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/user-plus.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18 7.5v3m0 0v3m0-3h3m-3 0h-3m-2.25-4.125a3.375 3.375 0 1 1-6.75 0 3.375 3.375 0 0 1 6.75 0ZM3 19.235v-.11a6.375 6.375 0 0 1 12.75 0v.109A12.318 12.318 0 0 1 9.374 21c-2.331 0-4.512-.645-6.374-1.766Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="112,24 102,34 86,18" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/user-plus.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18 7.5v3m0 0v3m0-3h3m-3 0h-3m-2.25-4.125a3.375 3.375 0 1 1-6.75 0 3.375 3.375 0 0 1 6.75 0ZM3 19.235v-.11a6.375 6.375 0 0 1 12.75 0v.109A12.318 12.318 0 0 1 9.374 21c-2.331 0-4.512-.645-6.374-1.766Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
